sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with standard_user / secret_sauce, add the first two products to the cart, then open the cart

workflow.name: Start Browser and Navigate
workflow.description: Begin from a fresh tab and go to Sauce Labs Demo site.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: On Sauce Labs Login Page
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'

workflow.name: On Products Inventory Page
workflow.description: Add the first two products to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a button with text 'Add to cart' is visible
actions: Click the first button with text 'Add to cart'
Click the second button with text 'Add to cart'

workflow.name: Products Added, Open Cart
workflow.description: Navigate to the shopping cart page after adding items.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a link with class 'shopping_cart_link' is visible and contains text '2'

workflow.name: On Shopping Cart Page
workflow.description: Confirm the cart is open with the added items.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If a div with class 'cart_item' is visible
actions: Terminate: Successfully added products and opened the cart
